title: RunYard Development Factory
description: Software factory for a product team: triage → roadmap-shape → ready → run → review → ship. Agents/workflows drive routine transitions; a disabled-by-default daily roadmap cadence proposes product work before implementation; a human gate protects shipping. Wire GitHub/CI/deploy secrets through the existing secrets and hook profiles; the release-notes/social hook point is documented in docs/concepts/boards.mdx but not wired in this template.

lanes.label: Needs triage
lanes.hint: New requests that need scope, owner, or priority.

lanes.label: Roadmap shaping
lanes.hint: Feature proposals and strategy asks that need product discussion before implementation.
lanes.empty: No roadmap proposals waiting for discussion.

trigger.label: Shape roadmap
trigger.description: Run product-workflow in execute=false mode to propose compact RunYard features for human discussion.

lanes.label: Ready to start
lanes.hint: Work that can be launched or assigned now.

trigger.label: Ready to launch
trigger.description: Suggest launching the smoke workflow when a card lands here.

lanes.label: In motion
lanes.hint: Work with an active run or ongoing owner action.

trigger.label: Launch linked run
trigger.description: Confirm before enqueueing the lane workflow and linking it to the ticket.

lanes.label: Needs decision
lanes.hint: Waiting, blocked, paused, failed, or approval-heavy work.

lanes.label: Review / approve
lanes.hint: Done enough to inspect, merge, accept, or send back.

transitions.message: Only humans mark shipped from Review — raise an approval instead of a bare PATCH.

lanes.label: Done
lanes.hint: Shipped or accepted work that can be archived later.
lanes.empty: No completed work on this board.

guard.message: Move work through Review / approve before marking it done.

schedules.name: RunYard daily roadmap shaping
schedules.description: Daily plan-only roadmap shaping for RunYard dogfooding. Produces compact feature proposals for Telegram discussion; an operator picks follow-up work before any implementation run is launched.

input.context: Daily RunYard roadmap shaping. Propose a compact set of high-leverage RunYard features for human discussion, not immediate implementation. For each proposal include rationale, acceptance checks, and a self-contained implementation prompt. Keep the report suitable to paste or summarize into Telegram; the operator will select what enters the gated implementation cycle.

schedules.name: RunYard nightly smoke
schedules.description: Nightly smoke-check that the deployment can execute a workflow end-to-end. Disabled by default; enable when the workflow slug exists on this Hub.
